content:
Daydream Believer:Anne Murray.
#12 on Billboard in 1979. (#3 on Country charts.)
(Monkee's version hit #1 in 1967.)

               (Capo 3rd fret.)

INTRO: [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]

#1.
[tab][ch]D7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, I could hide neath the wings of the [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
bluebird as she sings..[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]
the shaving razor's cold and it stings.[/tab]
